feat: enhance URL management by adding functions to get next URL ID and count short URLs

feat: enhance BDRC work matching with author information

- Updated the backend to include authors in the response from the find_matching_work function, transforming the output structure to include an 'authors' field.
- Modified the frontend API interface to accommodate the new authors field in BdrcMatchingSuggestion.
- Simplified the data handling in findMatchingBdrcWork to return the data directly.
- Enhanced the ListBDRCMatches component to display author information alongside work suggestions, improving user experience and information clarity.

feat: enhance SegmentsTab component with synchronized scrolling and improved layout

- Added synchronized horizontal scrolling between top and bottom tables using refs and callbacks for better user experience.
- Implemented a responsive spacer to adjust table width dynamically based on content.
- Updated loading and empty state UI for segments to improve visual feedback and consistency.
- Refactored segment data handling in OutlinerAdminSegment to flatten nested segments for easier access.
- Added a new entry to .gitignore for cursor files to keep the repository clean.

refactor: enhance SegmentRow and BDRCField components for improved work detail display

- Introduced a new BDRCInfo component to encapsulate work detail fetching and display logic, enhancing modularity.
- Updated SegmentRow to utilize BDRCInfo for displaying work titles, streamlining the UI.
- Refactored BdrcWorkDialogBody to improve loading and error handling for work details.
- Enhanced BDRCField to include a warning icon in error messages for better visibility.

feat: integrate BDRCSeachWrapper for enhanced work and author display in SegmentRow

- Added BDRCSeachWrapper to encapsulate BDRC work and author information, improving modularity and clarity.
- Updated the UI to display work titles and author names more effectively, enhancing user experience.
- Removed the previous button and dialog implementation for work details, streamlining the component structure.

feat: add BDRC work detail modal and improve BDRCField component

- Introduced a modal in BDRCField for viewing detailed information about matched BDRC works, enhancing user experience.
- Added functionality to identify possible duplicates with a button that opens the new modal.
- Updated the display logic to show work ID and author details, improving clarity and accessibility of information.
- Refactored terminology in ListBDRCMatches from "possible duplicates" to "suggestions" for better user understanding.

refactor: streamline BDRC matching and improve UI components

- Updated the BdrcMatchingSuggestion interface to include an optional `pref_label_bo` field for authors.
- Enhanced the findMatchingBdrcWork function to accept an optional AbortSignal for better request management.
- Refactored the ListBDRCMatches component to utilize a custom hook for fetching matching suggestions, improving code clarity and reusability.
- Updated the UI to reflect changes in terminology from "suggestions" to "possible duplicates" for better user understanding.
- Simplified the OutlinerAdminSegment component by ensuring segments are always an array, enhancing reliability.

feat: implement merge functionality for BDRC works and persons

- Added `merge_works` and `merge_persons` functions to handle merging of duplicate works and persons via BDRC OTAPI.
- Introduced new API endpoints for merging operations in the backend, enhancing data management capabilities.
- Updated frontend components to support merging actions, including new payload interfaces and API calls.
- Improved error handling for merge operations to provide better feedback during API interactions.

feat: refactor DocumentRow and DocumentsTab components to use new Table components

- Replaced traditional HTML table elements with custom Table, TableRow, TableCell, TableHead, and TableHeader components for improved styling and consistency.
- Updated DocumentRow to utilize the new TableCell structure, enhancing readability and maintainability.
- Adjusted DocumentsTab layout to accommodate the new table structure, ensuring a seamless user experience.

feat: add title search functionality to document listing

- Introduced a new optional `title` parameter in the `list_documents` API to allow case-insensitive substring matching on document filenames.
- Updated the frontend components to support title search, including input fields and state management for search queries.
- Enhanced the user interface to provide a search input for filtering documents by title, improving document management experience.
- Adjusted pagination and filtering logic to accommodate the new title search feature.

refactor: remove redundant text from OutlinerUpload component for cleaner UI

- Eliminated the unnecessary description text in the OutlinerUpload section to streamline the user interface.
- Focused on enhancing the overall readability and aesthetic of the Dashboard component.

feat: add annotator performance metrics to dashboard stats

- Implemented a new function to calculate per-annotator performance metrics, including document and segment counts, segments with titles or authors, and rejection counts.
- Updated the dashboard stats response model to include these new metrics, enhancing the analytics capabilities of the dashboard.
- Modified frontend components to display the new annotator performance data, improving insights into user contributions and document management.
- Enhanced overall layout and styling of dashboard components for better usability and visual consistency.

fix: rename DublicateModal to DuplicateModal and remove unused component

- Updated import statements and component references from DublicateModal to DuplicateModal for consistency.
- Deleted the DublicateComponent file as it was no longer in use.
- Enhanced BDRCField component to reflect the changes in modal naming, ensuring proper functionality.

refactor: enhance pagination and search functionality in Dashboard component

- Updated the Dashboard component to utilize URL search parameters for pagination, improving user navigation.
- Introduced a debounced title search feature, ensuring that search results reset to the first page when the search term changes.
- Refactored pagination logic to enhance clarity and maintainability, replacing state-based skip calculations with page-based logic.
- Improved user experience by updating pagination controls to reflect the current page accurately.

refactor: update DocumentRow, DocumentsTab, SegmentRow, and SegmentsTab components for improved layout and functionality

- Removed unnecessary table headers and adjusted layout in DocumentRow and DocumentsTab for better readability.
- Enhanced SegmentRow to display comment counts with a new icon and improved button sizes for better accessibility.
- Updated SegmentsTab to reflect changes in table headers, focusing on relevant information for users.
- Streamlined component structures to enhance maintainability and user experience.

feat: integrate line chart for annotator performance in OverviewTab

- Added a new line chart to visualize annotator performance metrics, enhancing data representation.
- Updated chart options for improved interactivity and styling, including point customization and grid adjustments.
- Replaced the previous bar chart with the line chart for better insights into performance trends over time.

refactor: clean up OverviewTab layout by removing unused segment status chart

- Removed the segment status chart section from OverviewTab to streamline the layout.
- Adjusted the positioning of the annotator performance section for improved organization.
- Enhanced overall readability and maintainability of the component.

chore: update Vite version in package.json overrides for @tailwindcss/vite

- Updated the Vite version in the package.json overrides from "^8" to "^8.0.2" to ensure compatibility with the latest features and improvements.

chore: add package overrides for @tailwindcss/vite in package.json

- Introduced an "overrides" section in package.json to specify a compatible Vite version for @tailwindcss/vite, ensuring better dependency management and compatibility.

feat: add BDRC admin functionality and improve UI components

- Introduced a new route for the BDRC admin page, allowing users to manage BDRC-related data.
- Updated Vite configuration to support a new backend URL for BDRC API interactions.
- Enhanced the layout of various admin components (DocumentsTab, SegmentsTab, UsersTab) for better usability and responsiveness.
- Refactored table components to improve styling and maintainability, ensuring a consistent user experience across the admin interface.
- Added new BDRC-related types and components to facilitate data handling and display.

refactor: adjust padding in DocumentsTab and SegmentsTab for improved layout

- Updated padding in the DocumentsTab and SegmentsTab components to enhance visual consistency and usability.
- Ensured better alignment of elements within the headers, contributing to a cleaner user interface.

fix: comment out BDRCField rendering in AnnotationSidebar

- Commented out the conditional rendering of the BDRCField component in AnnotationSidebar to prevent it from displaying based on the showBdrcMatch state.
- This change is intended to improve code clarity and maintainability while ensuring that the component's functionality remains intact.

feat: enhance OutlinerAdminLayout with icons and improved navigation

- Added icons (HomeIcon, FileIcon, UsersIcon) to admin navigation links for better visual representation.
- Updated the layout to include flex properties for improved alignment and spacing of navigation items.
- Introduced a new ADMIN_LABELS set to manage visibility of certain links based on user permissions, enhancing security and usability.

feat: update BDRC admin functionality and enhance UI components

- Upgraded Vite dependency to version 8.0.2 for improved performance and features.
- Refactored BDRC-related components to introduce new routes for managing works and persons, enhancing the admin interface.
- Removed outdated BDRC API files and hooks to streamline the codebase.
- Improved layout and navigation in the OutlinerAdminLayout, adding collapsible sections for better organization of admin links.
- Adjusted padding in UsersTab for a cleaner user interface.
- Updated index exports to reflect new BDRC components, ensuring proper integration within the application.

chore: update package dependencies for Tailwind CSS and Vite

- Upgraded @tailwindcss/vite to version 4.2.2 for improved features and compatibility.
- Updated @vitejs/plugin-react to version 6.0.0 to align with the latest React standards.
- Adjusted tailwindcss version to 4.2.2 for consistency across dependencies.
- Simplified Vite version specification in package.json to "^8" for better dependency management.
